title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.
highlights: pull & run models with one command

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, and tool callers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models, multi-user, RAG, plugins, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, async & blocking clients, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, list, pull, delete models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration: use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for Ollama: PDF chat, voice bots, function calling, Docker setups, etc.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds and dev shells; includes CUDA & ROCm variants.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose files for CPU/GPU (CUDA, ROCm) deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async/sync clients for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI for Ollama with session memory, model switcher, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within your notes.

title: ollama-mistral-7b-rag
summary: Ready-to-run RAG template using Ollama + Mistral 7B + Chroma for PDF question-answering.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that answers questions using local Ollama models via Bolt framework.
